title: The hidden system behind every Renaissance trial - Ada Palmer
summary: A YouTube discussion between host Dwarkesh Patel and historian Ada Palmer about the underlying systems and structures governing Renaissance trials. This historical analysis explores the hidden institutional frameworks that shaped judicial outcomes during the Renaissance period.
writeup: Ada Palmer examines the systematic structures that governed trials during the Renaissance, framing courtroom outcomes as products of institutional rules rather than isolated events. The discussion is historical and institutional analysis of how legal systems operated in the period. The takeaway is that Renaissance trials followed a hidden underlying system, and understanding that system clarifies how those proceedings worked.
